goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'sala thong'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '2 people' at '17:45' on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should 'leave after 14:15'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called sala thong
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 2 people at 17:45 on sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on monday
The train should go to london liverpool street and should leave after 14:15
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
